## Collections.AggregatedResultMapBase.composeId() method

Composes a collection ID and item ID into a composite ID.

**Signature:**

```typescript
composeId(collectionId: TCOLLECTIONID, itemId: TITEMID): Result<TCOMPOSITEID>;
```
